description: §21.2 — a bare `export { count }` at file top level, outside any `${ }` logic context, fires E-IMPORT-001. `export` is a logic-context declaration; it may only appear inside `${ }` (or as the §21.2 Form-1 `export <Component>` / Form-2 `export const` shapes, neither of which this is).
rationale: §21.2: all `export` statements must appear inside a `${ }` logic context (exceptions are Form-1 `export <ComponentName>...</>` and Form-2 `export const Name = ...`). A bare braced re-export list `export { count }` at file top is neither Form and is rejected E-IMPORT-001.
